name: devenv-docs
title: DevEnv Docs
description: Search and browse the DevEnv documentation
author: tmarice

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
preferences.description: Optional: Add a GitHub PAT to increase API rate limits. Create one at github.com/settings/tokens (no scopes needed).

commands.name: search-devenv-docs
commands.title: Search DevEnv Docs
commands.description: Search and browse the DevEnv documentation

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
